evals.prompt: I'm making this repo work in Codex and Claude Code. Add the right persistent instruction files and include the config pieces for MCP without guessing the syntax.
evals.expected_output: The agent should activate the skill, consult Codex and Claude Code official docs before editing, and separate provider-specific files and syntax.

evals.prompt: Can you wire Kimi Code into my Claude Code setup? I think it uses an OpenAI-ish endpoint but please just make it work.
evals.expected_output: The agent should activate the skill, check Kimi Code official docs for the current endpoint/model guidance and Claude Code docs for provider setup before recommending or editing configuration.

evals.prompt: Create a reusable plugin that works for codex, claude code, and kimi-code. Include hooks, skills, and any connector metadata those clients expect.
evals.expected_output: The agent should activate the skill, verify each provider's official plugin/skill/hook documentation independently, and avoid inventing a shared plugin shape where docs do not support one.
